name: Apple & Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sweet potatoes in a saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil and cook for 30 to 40 minutes or until tender.
2. Remove from water, peel and mash the sweet potatoes.
3. Add butter, apple juice, salt, and pepper to the mashed sweet potatoes. Stir in the diced apple, cloves, and a dash of nutmeg.
4. Place the mixture in an ovenproof serving dish and warm in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for about 15 minutes before serving.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FRUIT EXCHANGE
CAL: 116, CHO: 6mg; CAR: 24g; PRO: 1g; SOD: 80mg; FAT: 2g
